Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Amendment Rules, 2007. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette, -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY _ 2. Inthe Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 1989, in the Schedule 1 at serial number 11, fos the entry in column 3, the following entry shall be substituted namely -— "Districts of Gorakhpur, Deoria, Ballia, Gazipur, Azamgarh, Mau. Basti. Siddarthnagar, Mirzapur, Robertsganj, Jaunpur, Faizabad, Gonda, Bahraich, Varanasi, Maharaj Gianj, Kushinagar, Shravasti, Sant Kabir Nagar, Chandauli, Sant Ravi Das Nagar, Balrampur and Ambedkar Nagar of Uttar Pradesh.” [P.No, 2005/TC(RCTY/4-7/CAT] 8.
